name: swarph-mesh
summary: Model-agnostic Python substrate for the swarph-mesh ecosystem — the graph protocol third-party CLIs plug into. v0.7.6 adds the GeminiCLIAdapter (provider="gemini-cli"): a subprocess gemini -p subscription path mirroring ClaudeAdapter, OAuth-billed flat-rate ($0/call), with GEMINI_API_KEY/GOOGLE_API_KEY scrubbed from the subprocess env to prevent a silent flip to metered billing; default model pinned to the GA gemini-2.5-flash, override via GEMINI_SUBSCRIPTION_MODEL.
author: Pierre Samson, Claude Opus
